features.name: Baseline Harness And Google OAuth
features.description: A cookiecutter-style Django/Viewflow harness with custom email users, Google OAuth sign-in, Kisomo auth visuals, separated design-system CSS, and repeatable local verification.
features.evidence: Django scaffold, apps.users, auth templates, Kisomo-owned authenticated shell, static/dissertation CSS, image exports, init script, and preview helper are present. Verified with ./init.sh, python manage.py migrate --noinput, python manage.py test apps.users, python scripts/validate_json.py, a 200 OK response from /accounts/login/ on the local dev server, and a 302 Google OAuth redirect from /accounts/google/login/.

features.name: Reproducible Curriculum Intake And Source Snapshot
features.description: Register official TIE curriculum sources, capture reproducible source snapshots, validate evidence manifests, and expose staff-only curriculum intake review surfaces.
features.evidence: Milestone 22.5 merged in PR #1. Evidence includes schema-backed curriculum source and snapshot models, UUID evidence identifiers, source registry fixtures, curriculum snapshot service and command, staff-only source management and snapshot capture pages, dashboard/navigation integration, schema/example validation, and focused Django coverage. Verified with ./init.sh, python3 scripts/validate_json.py, and .venv/bin/python manage.py test apps.curriculum apps.users config.

features.name: Deterministic Curriculum Extraction And Candidate Topic Dataset
features.description: Extract normalized curriculum items from captured TIE source snapshots and produce a candidate topic dataset with source, page, section, and provenance references.
features.evidence: Deterministic Science and Mathematics seed extraction is implemented through the curriculum_extract command, create_curriculum_extraction service, and staff-only web launch/review UI. It writes curriculum_items.json and candidate_topics.json linked to a source snapshot, source IDs, page/section/table references, and pending animation-suitability fields. Web review lists generated items and candidate topics without screening or accepting topics. Verified with python3 scripts/validate_json.py and .venv/bin/python manage.py test apps.curriculum.

features.name: Rule-Based Topic Screening
features.description: Classify candidate topics using deterministic animation-suitability signals while preserving human review as the acceptance gate.
features.evidence: Next implementation target after Slice 2. Candidate topics are generated with empty screening_signals and pending review_status, ready for deterministic rule-based screening.
